dateTime:
import java.time.{LocalDate, LocalTime, LocalDateTime, ZonedDateTime, ZoneId}
import java.time.format.{DateTimeFormatter, FormatStyle}
import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit // For adding/subtracting time

object DateTimeDemo {
  def main(args: Array[String]): Unit = {
    println("--- Current Date and Time ---")

    // Current date and time based on system clock default timezone
    val now: LocalDateTime = LocalDateTime.now()
    println(s"Current LocalDateTime (default timezone): $now")

    // Current date and time with timezone information
    val zonedNow: ZonedDateTime = ZonedDateTime.now()
    println(s"Current ZonedDateTime (default timezone): $zonedNow")

    // Current date and time in a specific timezone (e.g., UTC)
    val utcNow: ZonedDateTime = ZonedDateTime.now(ZoneId.of("UTC"))
    println(s"Current ZonedDateTime (UTC): $utcNow")

    println("\n--- Components ---")
    println(s"Year: ${now.getYear}")
    println(s"Month: ${now.getMonthValue} (${now.getMonth})")
    println(s"DayOfMonth: ${now.getDayOfMonth}")
    println(s"DayOfWeek: ${now.getDayOfWeek}")
    println(s"Hour: ${now.getHour}")
    println(s"Minute: ${now.getMinute}")
    println(s"Second: ${now.getSecond}")
    println(s"NanoSecond: ${now.getNano}")
    println(s"TimeZone: ${zonedNow.getZone}")

    println("\n--- Formatting ---")
    // Default ISO format
    println(s"ISO LocalDateTime: ${now.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)}")
    println(s"ISO ZonedDateTime: ${zonedNow.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_ZONED_DATE_TIME)}")

    // Predefined localized formats
    val formatterFull = DateTimeFormatter.ofLocalizedDateTime(FormatStyle.FULL)
    val formatterLong = DateTimeFormatter.ofLocalizedDateTime(FormatStyle.LONG)
    val formatterMedium = DateTimeFormatter.ofLocalizedDateTime(FormatStyle.MEDIUM)
    val formatterShort = DateTimeFormatter.ofLocalizedDateTime(FormatStyle.SHORT)
    // Requires locale support, might vary based on system locale
    // println(s"Formatted (Full): ${zonedNow.format(formatterFull)}") // Can be very verbose
    println(s"Formatted (Long): ${zonedNow.format(formatterLong)}")
    println(s"Formatted (Medium): ${zonedNow.format(formatterMedium)}")
    println(s"Formatted (Short): ${zonedNow.format(formatterShort)}")

    // Custom format pattern
    val customPattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss Z" // Use Z for offset like +0000
    val customFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern(customPattern)
    println(s"Custom format ('$customPattern'): ${zonedNow.format(customFormatter)}")

    println("\n--- Parsing ---")
    val dateString = "2024-03-15T10:30:00+01:00[Europe/Paris]"
    Try(ZonedDateTime.parse(dateString, DateTimeFormatter.ISO_ZONED_DATE_TIME)) match {
      case Success(parsedDate) => println(s"Parsed ZonedDateTime: $parsedDate")
      case Failure(e) => println(s"Failed to parse '$dateString': ${e.getMessage}")
    }

    println("\n--- Epoch Time ---")
    // Seconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC
    val epochSeconds = zonedNow.toEpochSecond
    println(s"Seconds since epoch (UTC): $epochSeconds")
    // Milliseconds since epoch
    val epochMillis = zonedNow.toInstant.toEpochMilli
    println(s"Milliseconds since epoch (UTC): $epochMillis")

    println("\n--- Date/Time Arithmetic ---")
    val tomorrow = now.plusDays(1)
    val nextHour = now.plusHours(1)
    val tenMinutesAgo = now.minusMinutes(10)
    println(s"Tomorrow: $tomorrow")
    println(s"Next Hour: $nextHour")
    println(s"10 Mins Ago: $tenMinutesAgo")
    val daysBetween = ChronoUnit.DAYS.between(now, tomorrow)
    println(s"Days between now and tomorrow: $daysBetween")
  }
}
